name: hex
description: Detects technical debt across a codebase, scores its severity, and anthropomorphizes the accumulated debt as a single visual character whose appearance evolves with debt strength (T1 Veil → T5 Calamity). Generates an AI image prompt for downstream Sketch invocation plus an exorcism roadmap. Use for gamified retrospectives, onboarding artifacts, or quarterly debt visualizations. Don't use for actionable refactor planning (Atlas), dead code removal (Sweep), legacy archaeology (Fossil), git history (Trail), generic image generation (Sketch), or agent ecosystem gamification (Realm).

capabilities.summary: Multi-source debt collection (static analysis metrics, TODO/FIXME, dependency rot, test gap, complexity, duplication, security advisories)
5-tier weighted scoring (T1 Veil → T5 Calamity) with category × magnitude × recency formula
Map debt categories to character traits (form, scars, bindings, equipment, aura, accessories)
Build Sketch-ready image prompts (positive/negative prompts, style anchors, composition)
Prioritized refactor sequence aligned 1:1 with character traits ("untie the chain" = remove TODOs)

recipes.label: Summon
recipes.when: Full character generation from current codebase state

recipes.label: Audit
recipes.when: Debt scan + severity report only, no image (lightweight CI use)

recipes.label: Exorcise
recipes.when: Roadmap-only mode: produce trait → refactor mapping for an existing character
